title: Astra's Enhanced Trims
description: A resource/data pack that expands Vanilla's trims for items like Swords, Axes, Bows, Tridents and Spears
body:
![An image with rendered text saying "Astra's Enhanced Trims.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880f6b6549b2a14812bfae288a0dbae74569f3a7.png)

Enhanced Trims expands vanilla's trim system to use on items.

![An image with a smithing trim teplate on the left, an iron sword in the middle and lapis on the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a6f3a24928b4da8830bfa40464ea302896437c.png)

![Iron Tools with trims matching the vanilla trim colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d838e5e6c6cb32e103afe44a1da5c7a438bafeb.png)

The combined resourcepack and datapack file can be put in both the resourcepack folder and datapack folder without the need to extract it first.

Trimming works on all:
- Swords
- Axes
- Pickaxes
- Shovels
- Hoes
- Spears
- Bow
- Crossbow
- Fishing Rod
- Carrot on a Stick
- Warped Fungus on a Stick
- Trident
- Mace
- Shears
- Totem of Undying
- Trimming also works on Elytra's without the need for a Trim Smithing Template
![An Image of different items trimmed with gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77cd70d25db350bbceab43c066c9eda87087568c.png)


This Pack also adds new Tierd Shears with their own durability.
![Shears in different colors matching vanilla's tiered tools.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/607f661ee27468a2a48f7734cf507ae11c4b5c44.png)



The way the pack is done means that if no one uses the resourcepack but has the datapack it won't look like broken textures (All except the Elytra which just turns invisible.)
